sentences.arabic: كَانَ لِجَمَالٍ كَلْبٌ وَفِيٌّ اسْمُهُ نَمِرٌ.
sentences.translation: Džemal je imao vjernog psa po imenu Nemr.
sentences.translationEn: Jamal had a loyal dog named Namr.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ نَمِرٌ يَنْتَظِرُهُ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ عِنْدَ بَابِ الْبَيْتِ.
sentences.translation: Nemr ga je svaki dan čekao na kućnim vratima.
sentences.translationEn: Namr would wait for him every day at the house door.

sentences.arabic: كَانَا يَمْشِيَانِ مَعًا فِي الْحَدِيقَةِ كُلَّ مَسَاءٍ.
sentences.translation: Šetali su zajedno u parku svako veče.
sentences.translationEn: They would walk together in the park every evening.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ جَمَالٌ إِنَّ نَمِرًا أَوْفَى أَصْدِقَائِهِ.
sentences.translation: Džemal je rekao da je Nemr najvjerniji od njegovih prijatelja.
sentences.translationEn: Jamal said that Namr is the most loyal of his friends.
